name: Gelato
description: Web3 cloud infrastructure providing automation (smart-contract keepers), relay, VRF, account abstraction and rollup-as-a-service.

seo.title: Gelato — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Gelato: Web3 cloud infrastructure providing automation (smart-contract keepers), relay, VRF, account abstraction and rollup-as-a-service.

when_to_use: Automating smart-contract execution with keeper infrastructure
Gasless relay transactions in Web3 applications
On-chain VRF for provably fair randomness in games
ERC-4337 account abstraction bundling for Web3 apps
Rollup-as-a-service deployment for custom L2 chains

pros: Covers keepers, VRF, AA, and relay
cons: Pricing and fees can be opaque
review.verdict: A versatile web3 infra Swiss Army knife, with the usual tradeoff of trusting one provider.
review.best_for: dApp teams wanting automation, relay, VRF, and AA from one stack
review.not_for: Protocols that insist on fully self-hosted, minimal-trust infra

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based metering; scales with consumption, no explicit peak-lock.
